eligible_applicant_type: Mixed or lower income housing organizations
project_area: Arts and cultural programming and services
demographic_requirements: Projects should serve under-served populations, youth, seniors, mental health programs, hospitals, and mixed or lower income housing. Priority given to projects that align with the Cultural Equity Plan and promote diversity, equity, inclusion, and justice.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include non-profit organizations, individual artists, community groups, youth programs, senior programs, mental health programs, hospitals, and mixed or lower income housing organizations based in New Haven. For-profit entities are ineligible. Applicants must not have received awards in consecutive years for the same project. Projects must align with the Cultural Equity Plan and promote community engagement, economic influence, and social innovation. The City of New Haven cannot be the sole funder; applicants must seek additional support (including in-kind contributions not exceeding 50% of other support).
